problem id: bc19cd14
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00110011 -> 10101110
  01010111 -> 01101010
  01110010 -> 10011110
  10110010 -> 10010110
  00011110 -> 11011111
  11010011 -> 10111010
  11110010 -> 10011110
  00001001 -> 01001111
  00111011 -> 00101111
  10100111 -> 01110101

query: 10110001
predicted answer: 11010110
